title: Is The Rally In The TJX Companies Stock Over?
text: If you are wondering if the rally in the TJX Companies (NYSE: TJX) is over the answer is probably not. The bigger question is what will happen between now and the following new high, and that is a consolidation.

title: TJX Has Phenomenal Suppliers To Gain Share Of Market - Reports Year -End Results
text: Ernie Herrman, CEO and President of TJX pointed to his 1,100 buyers who are dealing with 21,000 suppliers to get the best values in apparel and accessories for their stores.

title: TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call February 22, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Ernie Herrman - CEO, President & Director Debra McConnell - SVP, Global Communications John Klinger - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Michael Binetti - Crédit Suisse Omar Saad - Evercore ISI Lorraine Hutchinson - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Matthew Boss - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Paul Lejuez - Citigroup Brooke Roach - Goldman Sachs Group Marni Shapiro - The Retail Tracker Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the TJX Companies Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results Conference Call.

title: The TJX Companies (TJX) Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Rise
text: The TJX Companies' (TJX) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect an increase in earnings per share and net sales. The company boosts the share buyback plan.

title: TJX (TJX) Q4 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: The headline numbers for TJX (TJX) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended January 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: TJX (TJX) Matches Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: TJX (TJX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 2.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: TJX Earnings In Line, Outlook Soft From Recession-Resistant Retailer
text: The TJX earnings report kicks off a parade of discount and bargain retail earnings. TJX stock edged lower.

title: TJ Maxx's Parent, TJX Cos., Beats Revenue Expectations
text: The off-price retailer reported revenue of $14.5 billion, compared with the $14.07 billion analysts expected.

title: TJX Companies stock gains after net and same-store sales beat expectations, while profit matched
text: Shares of TJX Companies TJX, -1.27% gained 0.8% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the off-price apparel and home fashions retailer reported fiscal fourth-quarter profit that matched expectations but sales that beat, as customer traffic increased and amid strength in its Marmaxx branded stores. Net income for the quarter to Jan. 28 rose to $1.04 billion, or 89 cents a share, from $940 million, or 78 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: The TJX Companies, Inc. Reports Q4 and FY23 Results; Above-Plan Q4 FY23 U.S. Comp Sales Growth of 4% and Q4 FY23 Marmaxx Comp Sales Growth of 7%; Plans to Increase Dividend by 13% and to Buy Back $2.0 to $2.5 Billion of Stock in FY24
text: FRAMINGHAM, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TJX), the leading off-price apparel and home fashions retailer in the U.S. and worldwide, today announced sales and operating results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 28, 2023. Net sales for the fourth quarter of Fiscal 2023 were $14.5 billion, an increase of 5% versus the fourth quarter of Fiscal 2022. U.S. comp store sales (defined below) increased 4% versus a 13% increase in U.S.

title: How Do These 2 Retail Giants Shape Up Heading Into Earnings?
text: Earnings season continues to unravel, with an extensive list of companies delivering quarterly prints daily. Soon, we'll hear from Target and The TJX Companies.

title: The TJX Companies: Off-Price Remains The Best Bet In Retail
text: The TJX Companies is set to report quarterly and year-end results on Wednesday, the 22nd. In advance of their release, shares are trading in a narrow range and are up just over 1% YTD. This trails broader market indexes.

title: The 10 Biggest Companies Reporting Earnings in the Fourth Week of February 2023
text: Companies with a strong earnings growth rate are usually on traders' radars. Thus, it is important to keep track of stocks that are due to announce their earnings report card.

title: TJX Among Apparel Retailers All Dressed Up & Ready For Growth
text: TJX is up 11.14% in the past three months, bolting 5.19% higher in mid-November following the company's most recent earnings report. The move was due to better-than-expected guidance for the fourth quarter, which the company is expected to report on February 22.

title: The TJX Companies, Inc. to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2023 Results February 22, 2023
text: FRAMINGHAM, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TJX) today announced that it plans to release its fourth quarter and full year Fiscal 2023 sales and earnings results on Wednesday, February 22, 2023, before 9:30 a.m. ET. At 11:00 a.m. ET that day, Ernie Herrman, TJX's Chief Executive Officer and President, will hold a conference call to discuss the Company's fourth quarter and full year Fiscal 2023 results, operations, and business trends.

title: TJX Companies: Risky On A Positive Labor Market Report And Potential Inventory Impairments
text: TJX shows a growing store count and has a record inventory level. However, short-term uncertainties from its slowing revenue growth versus its growing inventory level makes it a risky stock.
